rules.description: API controllers must not depend on provider-specific repository/entity types.
Business rules and role/permission enforcement must be implemented in service layer methods.
Service layer depends on contract interfaces, not concrete data providers.
Prefer one primary entity/repository boundary per service to control complexity.
Service dependency graph must be acyclic; use coordinator/facade services for cross-service workflows.
Tenant-scoped write and access workflows must validate tenant context in service layer.
New major behaviors should be feature-flagged or configured via options.
Repository provider setup must document and follow connection string fallback cascade.
Error handling and logging must have safe defaults when host apps do not provide custom sinks.
